title: Nivana - Mental Health Platform
description: Engineered a scalable full-stack MERN application with 10+ modules including authentication, mood tracking, and dashboards. Integrated an AI-powered self-assessment system using the Gemini API for personalized insights. Built wellness features like meditation, journaling, and mood analytics.

title: Shortest Path Visualizer
description: Developed an interactive pathfinding visualizer using Dijkstra's Algorithm for shortest path computation. Built a dynamic UI with graph manipulation (nodes, edges, drag-and-drop). Optimized performance by 40% using a custom priority queue and efficient graph traversal.

title: CouponSys - Coupon Management Platform
description: Built a backend-driven coupon management system to generate, track, and manage coupons with expiry and redemption workflows. Implemented 15+ features including coupon generation, filtering, and admin dashboard controls. Processed 200+ transactions ensuring data accuracy.
